title: The Hollow Protocol
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced CIA geologist discovers that a string of earthquakes, sinkholes, and volcanic eruptions across the Ring of Fire are not natural disasters but targeted geological attacks, and the next tremor will trigger the Yellowstone supervolcano.
long_description: A disgraced CIA geologist discovers that a string of earthquakes, sinkholes, and volcanic eruptions across the Ring of Fire are not natural disasters but targeted geological attacks, and the next tremor will trigger the Yellowstone supervolcano.
